footer.returnPolicyContent:
החלפת מוצר

1. להחלפת המוצר יש לפנות לשירות הלקוחות באמצעות הואטסאפ לתיאום ההחזרה במספר 0505727854.
2. לחלפת מוצר יש לשלוח אותו בחזרה לעסק (רק אם הוא חדש ובקופסה המקורית) תוך 14 ימים מיום קבלתו.
3. הלקוח ישלח את המוצר על חשבונו באחת מהדרכים המצויינות מטה.
4. אחרי קבלת המוצר בחזרה על ידי החנות יישלח ללקוח מוצר חליפי שהוא בחר חינם לנקודת איסוף.
* מוצר שיוחזר לא בקופסה המקורית או משומש או שנגרם לו נזק לא יוחלף ולא יזוכה!
** את החבילה יש לעטוף בניילון או נייר. אין להדביק או לכתוב על הקופסה המקורית!

    קיימות 2 דרכים לשליחת המוצר ולביצוע החלפה:

בדואר רשום לכתובת שנספק לכם בוואטאפ. (הדואר גובה בין 15-20ש"ח). ברגע שהחבילה מגיעה אלינו נשלח לכם את המוצר שרציתם לנקודת איסוף חינם ללא עלות.
החלפה בבית הלקוח בעלות 49 ש"ח: שליח מגיע אליכם עד הבית עם המוצר החליפי לביצוע ההחלפה במקום. עלות 49 ₪ בתשלום מראש.
אם הלקוח יבחר להחליף למוצר יותר יקר הוא ישלם את ההפרש מראש בלינק (קישור) שיישלח אליו במייל או בואטסאפ. אם המוצר יותר זול אז הלקוח יקבל החזר על ההפרש באותו אופן של התשלום.
החזר כספי עבור הפרש המחיר יקבל תוך 3 ימי עסקים אחרי שהמוצר שהוא החזיר הגיע למחסן ונמצא תקין ולא משומש!

* שליחת החלפה שנייה תהיה על חשבון הלקוח!

    

החזרת מוצר וקבלת החזר כספי

* להחזרת המוצר יש לפנות לשירות הלקוחות הואטסאפ לתיאום ההחזרה במספר 0505727854.
* החזרת מוצר תתאפשר תוך 14 ימים מיום קבלתו רק אם הוא חדש ובקופסה המקורית ולא בוצע בו שימוש.
* החזרת המוצר תהיה על חשבון הלקוח.
* ההחזר הכספי יהיה עבור המוצרים בלבד ולא יכלול החזרת עלות המשלוח ששולמה בעת הרכישה!
* ההחזר הכספי יינתן באותו אופן של התשלום ויבוצע תוך 5 ימי עסקים מיום הגעת המוצר לחנות.
ניתן להחזיר את המוצרים באחת מהדרכים הבאות:
בדואר רשום לכתובת שנספק לכם בוואטאפ.
עם שליח בעלות 40 ש"ח: שליח מגיע אליכם עד הבית, אוסף את המוצר ומחזיר לנו. אחרי שהמוצר מגיע אלינו בחזרה עם השליח נבצע לכם החזר כספי. ניתן לשלם את עלות המשלוח ישירות לשליח או לשלם לנו אונליין מראש באמצעות כרטיס אשראי ללינק שנשלח אליכם.
footer.shippingPolicyContent:
1. הלקוח יבחר את סוג המשלוח שירצה בעגלת הקניות ועלות המשלוח תתווסף למחיר המוצר.
2. המשלוח יתבצע באמצעות חברת שילוח חיצונית "צ'יטה משלוחים".

3. החבילה תישלח תוך 1 ימי עסקים מיום ביצוע ההזמנה.

4. זמן האספקה הוא 3-5 ימי עסקים מיום מסירתה לשליח.

5. במשלוח מסוג "משלוח לנקודת איסוף" החבילה תישלח לנקודת איסוף הכי קרובה לכתובת שסופקה ע"י הלקוח. לחברת "צ'יטה" יש מאות נקודות איסוף בכל חלקי הארץ. ברגע הגעת החבילה ליעד תישלח הודעת SMS עם כל הפרטים ללקוח.

6. במשלוח עד הבית החבילה תישלח לכתובת שסיפק הלקוח.

7. עלות משלוח עד הבית שחברת המשלוחים גובה מהחנות האינטרנטית נעה בין 40 ש"ח ל- 60 ש"ח תלוי באיזור. המחיר הגבוה הוא מחיר שילוח ל- "איזורים חריגים" על פי הגדרת חברת השילוח "צ'יטה", לרשימת האיזורים החריגים לחצו כאן

8. עלות משלוח מסוג "משלוח לנקודת איסוף" היא 20 ש"ח לכל האיזורים.

9. כל עלויות המשלוח שהלקוח מתבקש לשלם מסופסדות ומוזלות על ידי SHOES BOX בה הלקוח משלם חלק מעלות המשלוח המצויינת בסעיפים 8 ו- 9.
footer.privacyPolicyContent:
1.  עקרונות

מדיניות זו מסבירה כיצד נאסף, נשמר, נעשה שימוש ונמסר מידע אישי באתר (להלן: “האתר”).
“מידע אישי” ו“עיבוד” כהגדרתם בחוק הגנת הפרטיות, כנוסחם לאחר תיקון 13.

2. סוגי המידע שנאסף

2.1 פרטי זיהוי ויצירת קשר: שם, דוא״ל, טלפון, כתובת משלוח/חיוב.
2.2 פרטי הזמנה ותשלום (פרטי כרטיס אשראי מעובדים ע״י ספקי סליקה מורשים; האתר אינו שומר פרטי כרטיס מלאים).
2.3 מידע טכני ושימושי: כתובת IP, מזהי מכשיר/עוגיות, דפי צפייה, רכישות, פעולות באתר.
2.4 העדפות שיווקיות ותכתובות שירות.

3. איך נאסף המידע

3.1 ישירות מהלקוח בעת הרשמה/ביצוע הזמנה/יצירת קשר.
3.2 אוטומטית באמצעות עוגיות וטכנולוגיות דומות.
3.3 מצדדים שלישיים: Google Analytics; ייתכן שימוש ב-Facebook (Meta) וב-TikTok למדידה, התאמה אישית ופרסום ממוקד.

4. עוגיות וכלי מדידה

4.1 האתר עושה שימוש בעוגיות ובפיקסלים של Google Analytics, וכן ייתכן שימוש בפיקסלים של Facebook ו-TikTok לצרכי ניתוח, מדידה, שיפור חוויית משתמש ושיווק ממוקד.
4.2 ניתן לנהל/למחוק עוגיות דרך הגדרות הדפדפן ולשנות העדפות במנהל העוגיות באתר (אם קיים).
4.3 צדדים שלישיים עשויים להציב עוגיות משלהם ולקבל נתוני שימוש (כגון IP/מזהה פרסום/אירועי רכישה) לפי מדיניותם. מומלץ לעיין במדיניות אותם ספקים.
4.4 המדיניות מבחינה בין נתונים שנמסרו מיודע מראש לבין נתונים הנאספים באמצעי מעקב, ומבהירה מטרות והשימוש בצדדים שלישיים.

5. מטרות העיבוד

5.1 ניהול חשבון והזמנות; מתן תמיכה ושירות לקוחות.
5.2 עמידה בהתחייבויות חוזיות ומשפטיות (חשבוניות/מיסוי).
5.3 אבטחה, מניעת הונאה וניהול סיכונים.
5.4 ניתוח שימושיות ושיפור האתר והמוצרים.
5.5 שיווק והצעות מותאמות (בכפוף להעדפות הלקוח ודין רלוונטי).

6. מסירת מידע לצדדים שלישיים

6.1 ספקי שירות כמעבדי נתונים: סליקה, לוגיסטיקה/משלוחים, מערכות דיוור, תשתיות ענן ואירוח.
6.2 פלטפורמת החנות “istores” — המידע נשמר ומעובד גם על גבי פלטפורמת istores המשמשת כתשתית טכנולוגית להפעלת החנות (“מעבד נתונים”).
6.3 כלי מדידה/פרסום: Google Analytics; ייתכן Facebook ו-TikTok, כמפורט בסעיף 4.
6.4 רשויות מוסמכות/אכיפה לפי דין, והעברה במסגרת שינוי מבני עסקי מותר.

7. העברה ואחסון מחוץ לישראל

חלק מהמידע מאוחסן בשרתי ספקים מחוץ לישראל. העברות יתבצעו לפי דרישות הדין החל.

8. אבטחת מידע

נוקטים אמצעים ארגוניים, טכניים ופיזיים סבירים להגנה על המידע, בהתאם לדין ולתקנות הגנת הפרטיות (אבטחת מידע), תשע״ז-2017.

9. שמירת מידע

נשמור מידע כל עוד נחוץ למטרות שלשמן נאסף, לקיום חיובים חוזיים/משפטיים, ולהגנה על זכויותינו, ולאחר מכן יימחק/יונונימז ככל הניתן.

10. זכויותיך

10.1 זכות לעיון במידע האישי המעובד עליך ולקבלת עותק.
10.2 זכות לתיקון/מחיקה של מידע שאינו נכון, שלם, ברור או מעודכן; הודעה על תיקון/מחיקה תימסר למי שקיבל מאיתנו את המידע כנדרש בדין.
10.3 משיכת הסכמה לעיבוד המתבסס על הסכמה — ככל שהדבר אפשרי ובדרך נוחה וסבירה.

11. מחיקת חשבון/מידע – איך מבקשים

11.1 הלקוח יכול למחוק את חשבונו או לבקש מחיקת מידע באחת מהדרכים:
כניסה לאזור האישי ובחירת בקשת מחיקה;
פנייה לבעל האתר באמצעות פרטי יצירת הקשר המפורסמים באתר.

11.2 המחיקה תבוצע לאחר אישור קבלת הבקשה ועמידה בתנאים שבדין (לרבות מידע שחובה לשמור לפי חוק).

12. ממונה על הגנת הפרטיות (DPO)

אם על האתר תחול החובה למנות ממונה על הגנת פרטיות לפי תיקון 13, פרטי הממונה ודרכי ההתקשרות עמו יפורסמו באתר.

13. קטינים
האתר אינו מיועד לשימוש עצמאי ע״י קטינים מתחת לגיל 18. אם התקבלה הודעה על מסירת מידע ע״י קטין ללא הסכמת הורה/אפוטרופוס, נפעל להסרה.

14. עדכונים למדיניות
נעדכן מדיניות זו מעת לעת. גרסה עדכנית תפורסם באתר ותיכנס לתוקף במועד פרסומה.
footer.termsOfServiceContent:
תקנון החנות

1.הנך מתבקש לקרוא תקנון זה במלואו ובעיון , כתנאי מוקדם להתקשרות בין הצדדים

2. החנות משמשת לרכישת מוצרים על ידי ציבור הגולשים באינטרנט בישראל ורשאים לרכוש בה בני 18 ומעלה ,בעלי תא דואר אלקטרוני ברשת האינטרנט בישראל ובעל כתובת מגורים בישראל , אשר ברשותם כרטיס אשראי תקף בישראל.

3. תנאי מוקדם לתוקף זכייתו של משתתף ברכישה הוא אישור חברת כרטיסי האשראי לעיסקה ולגביה.

4. גלישה בחנות ו/או רכישת המוצר ו/או שירות המוצעים למכירה בו , מהווה את הסכמתך לקבל ולנהוג על פי הוראות התקנון , לפיכך אם אינך מסכים לתנאי מתנאי תקנון זה , הנך מתבקש לא לעשות כל שימוש בחנות.

6. המחיר הינו כולל מע"מ אלא אם צויין מפורשות אחרת.

7. יתכנו הבדלים ברמת הצבע בין התמונה המוצגת למוצר בפועל. הבדלים אלו נובעים מסוג המצלמה, תיאורה, הגדרות הצבע במסכים וסוגי מסכים שונים וכולה...

 

רכישת מוצרים

באתר מוצעים למכירה כמות מוגבלת של מוצרים במחיר קבוע מראש. הליך המכירה יתבצע בתנאים כדלקמן :

1. החנות תציג רשימת מוצרים לרבות כל הפרטים אודות המוצר או השירות המוצע למכירה ואת המחיר כפי שנקבע מראש, המכירה הינה עד גמר המלאי.

2. לאחר הוספת המוצרים המבוקשים ל"עגלת הקניות" ימשיך הקונה בעמוד "עגלת הקניות" ל"אישור קנייה" ושם ימלא את פרטיו המלאים ולאחר מכן יסתיים הליך הקנייה האינטרנטי.



אימות כרטיס אשראי

העסק יהיה רשאי לדרוש מהלקוח אימות כרטיס האשראי שלו ע"י שליחת צילום סלפי של בעל הכרטיס שבה יופיעו גם ת.ז. וכרטיס האשראי שלו למספר הוואטסאפ של העסק. במקרה זה חייב שהשם שעל כרטיס האשראי יהיה תואם לשם בתעודת הזהות.

במקרה שאין התאמה או הלקוח יסרב לביצוע אימות הניתונים יהיה העסק רשאי לבטל את העיסקה.

ניתן להחזיר את המוצרים באחת מהדרכים הבאות:

איסוף ע"י שליח בעלות 39 ש"ח: שליח מגיע אליכם עד הבית, אוסף את המוצר ומחזיר לנו. אחרי שהמוצר מגיע אלינו בחזרה עם השליח אנחנו שולחים לכם מוצר חלופי לנקודת איסוף (לא עד הבית): עלות 39 ₪ בתשלום מראש.
 
ביטול הזמנה

1. ככלל הלקוח רשאי לבטל את העיסקה*  בכפוף ובהתאם להוראות חוק הגנת הצרכן התשמ"א 1981 ( להלן החוק: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/deal-annulment-regulations )

2. ניתן לבטל רכישת מוצר טרם שהוא נשלח. הביטול יעשה אך ורק בהודעה שתשלח באמצעות הוואטסאפ למספר 0505727854.

3. אם המוצר טרם נשלח ההזמנה תבוטל ויבוצע החזר כספי

4. אם הלקוח יבקש ביטול הזמנה אחרי שהמוצר נשלח, יהיה עליו לקבל אותו ואז להחזיר את המוצר לפי נוהל "החזרת מוצר וקבלת החזר כספי הפיסקה לעיל. מוסכם כי הלקוח יחזיר את המוצר באריזתו ולא משומש, שלם וללא פגיעה ו/או נזק ו/או פגם מכל מין וסוג שהוא. אחרי הגעת המוצר בחזרה אל החנות יבוצע החזר כספי עבור המוצר ולא יכלול עלות המשלוח

5. החנות תהיה רשאית לבטל עיסקה או מכירה כולה או חלקה במקרים הבאים:

נפלה טעות קולמוס , בין אם במחיר המוצר ובין אם בתיאור המוצר.
במקרה של כוח עליון , פעולת מלחמה , איבה ,טרור מגפה ו/או כל דבר אחר אשר ימנע המשך ביצוע מכירה תקין.
המוצר נמצא פגום.
המוצר אזל מהמלאי.
חשד להונאה בכ"א
6. הודעה על ביטול המכירה תימסר לקונים בטלפון ו/או בדואר אלקטרוני לכתובת אשר צויינה בדף ההרשמה.

     *מקרים בהם לא ניתן לבטל עסקה: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/cases-for-no-annulment-rights

 

 אספקת המוצרים

1. החנות תדאג למסור את המוצר שהוזמן באתר לשליחה תוך שני ימי עסקים לכל היותר לאחר אישור של חברת האשראי על העסקה.

2. החנות ו/או הספקים לא יהיו אחראים לאיחור בביצוע אספקת המוצר במקרים שהם לא בשליטתם. איחורים באספקה הם באחריות חברת המשלוחים.

3. זמני אספקת המוצרים ו/או השירותים כפי שאלה מצויינים בדף המכירה כוללים רק ימי עסקים קרי, יום א-ה לא כולל שישי שבת , ערבי חג וימי חג.



משלוח

1. הלקוח יבחר את סוג המשלוח שירצה בעגלת הקניות ועלות המשלוח תתווסף למחיר המוצר.
2. המשלוח יתבצע באמצעות חברת שילוח חיצונית "צ'יטה משלוחים".

3. החבילה תישלח תוך 1 ימי עסקים מיום ביצוע ההזמנה.

4. זמן האספקה הוא 3-5 ימי עסקים מיום מסירתה לשליח.

5. במשלוח מסוג "משלוח לנקודת איסוף" החבילה תישלח לנקודת איסוף הכי קרובה לכתובת שסופקה ע"י הלקוח. לחברת "צ'יטה" יש מאות נקודות איסוף בכל חלקי הארץ. ברגע הגעת החבילה ליעד תישלח הודעת SMS עם כל הפרטים ללקוח.

6. במשלוח עד הבית החבילה תישלח לכתובת שסיפק הלקוח.

7. עלות משלוח עד הבית שחברת המשלוחים גובה מהחנות האינטרנטית נעה בין 40 ש"ח ל- 60 ש"ח תלוי באיזור. המחיר הגבוה הוא מחיר שילוח ל- "איזורים חריגים" על פי הגדרת חברת השילוח "צ'יטה", לרשימת האיזורים החריגים לחצו כאן

8. עלות משלוח מסוג "משלוח לנקודת איסוף" היא 20 ש"ח לכל האיזורים.

9. כל עלויות המשלוח שהלקוח מתבקש לשלם מסופסדות ומוזלות על ידי SHOES BOX בה הלקוח משלם חלק מעלות המשלוח המצויינת בסעיפים 8 ו- 9.



אחריות
1. האחריות על המוצרים תינתן ע"י הייבואן או היצרן.
2. האחריות תינתן על פגם בתהליך הייצור או פגם בחומר.
3. במידה והמוצר/הנעל נפגמה אחרי שימוש כגון עקב נשבר או סוליה נפתחה וכדומה, הנעל תתוקן בחברה.
4. האחריות לא תחול במקרים הבאים:
    4.1 נעשה שימוש במוצר שאינו תואם את ייעודו המקורי כמו לשחק כדורגל בנעל ריצה.

    4.2 המוצר נפגם בזדון או עקב גורם חיצוני בעת השימוש.

    4.3 שפשופים, שריטות, קילופים או קרעים הנובעים מבלאי או משחיקה.

    4.4 הנעל עברה ניקוי באמצעות שטיפה במים, השרייה בסבון, במכונת כביסה או ביד.

    4.5 הבגד כובס לא לפי הוראות היצרן (אם זה מוצר ביגוד).

    4.6  בלאי, שחיקה, ריח ואי נוחות לאחר השימוש במוצר אינם נחשבים לפגמים בייצור ואינם באחריות.

    4.7 נזק שנגרם כתוצאה משימוש רשלני או לא תקין.



5. האחריות על המוצר תינתן עם הצגת חשבונית קנייה בלבד ותוך זמן סביר.

6. האחריות על המוצר תינתן בחנות הפיזית המפעילה את החנות האינטרנטית.

7. החנות מתחייבת לשלוח את המוצר לבדיקה שבמסגרת האחריות אצל הייבואן או הייצרן ולתקנו תוך 14 ימי עבודה במקרה של פגם בחומר או בתהליך הייצור ובכפוף לשימוש סביר במוצר.

8. אחרי סיום הטיפול הלקוח יבחר אם יאסוף את המוצר מהחנות בעצמו או ייבקש לשלוח את המוצר אליו במשלוח בעלות 30 ש"ח על חשבונו.

 

שירות לקוחות

כל שאלה או בירור לגבי המוצרים המוצגים באתר לרבות מידע על שימוש נכון במוצר ולפרטים ובירורים באשר לחנות ופעילותה , ניתן לפנות אלינו:

וואטסאפ: 0505727854

דוא"ל: shoesbox@outlook.co.il

 

 כללי

1. התמונות המוצגות באתר הן להמחשה בלבד , ואינן מחייבות את החנות. ייתכנו הבדלים ברמת הצבע בין התמונה למוצר בפועל, ההבדלים נובעים מרמת תיאורה, סוגי מסך שונים וכולה...

2. החנות ו/או מי מטעמה לא יהיו אחראים ולא ישאו בכל נזק ישיר , עקיף , תוצאתי או מיוחד שנגרם למשתמש או לצד שלישי , כתוצאה משימוש באמצעות האתר .

3. החנות לא תהא אחראית להרכבתם ו/או התקנתם של מוצרים שנרכשו באתר ואחריות זו תחול על הלקוח ועל חשבונו.

4. אייקונים (ICONS) כל מידע ו/או תצוגה המופיעים באתר , לרבות גרפיקה , עיצוב , הצגה מילולית , סימני מסחר , סימני לוגו לרבות עריכתם והצגתם באתר,הנם בבעלותם הבלעדית של החנות.


5. אין להעתיק , לשכפל, להפיץ , לפרסם או להשתמש בכל דרך אחרת בתכנים המופיעים באתר , אלא אם כן ניתנה הסכמה בכתב ומראש מטעם החנות.

footer.returnPolicyContent:
## Product exchange

1. To exchange a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.
2. To exchange a product, send it back to the business (new and in original packaging only) within 14 days of receipt.
3. The customer will ship the product at their own expense using one of the methods listed below.
4. After the store receives the product, a replacement product of the customer's choice will be sent free of charge to a pickup point.

Products returned without original packaging, used or damaged will not be exchanged or refunded!
** Wrap the package in plastic or paper. Do not stick labels or write on the original box!

There are 2 ways to send the product and complete an exchange:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage is 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Home exchange at 49 ILS: A courier comes to your home with the replacement product to complete the exchange on the spot. 49 ILS paid in advance.

If the customer chooses to exchange for a more expensive product they will pay the difference in advance via a link sent by email or WhatsApp. If the product is cheaper, the customer will receive a refund for the difference by the same payment method.

Refund for a price difference will be made within 3 business days after the returned product reaches the warehouse and is found to be in good and unused condition!

A second exchange shipment is at the customer's expense!

## Product return and refund

To return a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.

Returns are allowed within 14 days of receipt only if the product is new, in original packaging and unused.

Return shipping is at the customer's expense.

The refund is for products only and does not include the delivery cost paid at purchase!

The refund will be made by the same payment method within 5 business days of the product reaching the store.

You may return products in one of the following ways:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp.

Courier at 40 ILS: A courier comes to your home, collects the product and returns it to us. After the product reaches us with the courier we will process your refund. You may pay the delivery cost directly to the courier or pay us online in advance by credit card via a link we send you.
footer.shippingPolicyContent:
## Shipping Policy

1. The customer will choose the type of delivery they want in the shopping cart and the delivery cost will be added to the product price.
2. Delivery will be carried out by an external shipping company "Cheetah Shipping".
3. The package will be sent within 1 business day of placing the order.
4. Delivery time is 3-5 business days from handover to the courier.
5. For "pickup point" delivery, the package will be sent to the pickup point closest to the address provided by the customer. "Cheetah" has hundreds of pickup points across the country. When the package arrives at the destination, an SMS with all details will be sent to the customer.
6. For home delivery, the package will be sent to the address provided by the customer.
7. Home delivery cost charged by the shipping company to the online store ranges from 40 ILS to 60 ILS depending on the area. The higher price is for "special areas" as defined by "Cheetah" shipping company — for the list of special areas click here.
8. Pickup point delivery cost is 20 ILS for all areas.
9. All delivery costs that the customer is asked to pay are subsidised and discounted by SHOES BOX, with the customer paying part of the delivery cost as specified in sections 8 and 9.
footer.privacyPolicyContent:
## Privacy Policy

1. Principles

This policy explains how we collect, store, use and share personal information on this website ("the Site").
"Personal information" and "processing" are as defined in the Privacy Protection Law, as amended.

2. Types of information we collect

2.1 Identifying and contact details: name, email, phone, shipping/billing address.
2.2 Order and payment details (payment details are processed by licensed payment processors; the Site does not store full card details).
2.3 Technical and usage data: IP address, device/cookie IDs, pages viewed, purchases, site activity.
2.4 Marketing preferences and correspondence.

3. How we collect information

3.1 Directly from you when you register, place an order or contact us.
3.2 Automatically via cookies and similar technologies.
3.3 From third parties: Google Analytics; we may use Facebook (Meta) and TikTok for measurement, personalisation and targeted advertising.

4. Cookies and measurement tools

4.1 The Site uses cookies and pixels of Google Analytics, and may use pixels of Facebook and TikTok for analysis, measurement, improving user experience and targeted marketing.
4.2 You can manage or delete cookies in your browser and change preferences in the site cookie manager (if available).
4.3 Third parties may set their own cookies and receive usage data (e.g. IP/advertising ID/purchase events) per their policies. We recommend reviewing those policies.
4.4 This policy distinguishes between data provided with prior knowledge and data collected via tracking, and clarifies purposes and use by third parties.

5. Purposes of processing

5.1 Account and order management; customer support.
5.2 Legal and contractual obligations (invoicing, tax).
5.3 Security, fraud prevention and risk management.
5.4 Usage analysis and site and product improvement.
5.5 Marketing and tailored offers (in line with your preferences and applicable law).

6. Sharing with third parties

6.1 Service providers acting as processors: payments, logistics/shipping, email systems, cloud and hosting infrastructure.
6.2 The store platform "istores" — information is stored and processed on the istores platform used to operate the store ("processor").
6.3 Measurement/advertising tools: Google Analytics; possibly Facebook and TikTok, as set out in section 4.
6.4 Authorities or enforcement as required by law; transfer in the context of permitted business restructuring.

7. Transfer and storage outside Israel

Some information is stored on servers of providers outside Israel. Transfers will be made in accordance with applicable legal requirements.

8. Information security

We take organisational, technical and physical measures to protect information, in accordance with the law and the Privacy Protection (Information Security) Regulations, 2017.

9. Data retention

We retain information as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, for contractual/legal obligations and to protect our rights, and thereafter delete or anonymise where possible.

10. Your rights

10.1 Right to access your personal data and receive a copy.
10.2 Right to correct or delete inaccurate or incomplete data; notice of correction/deletion will be given to those who received the information from us as required by law.
10.3 Withdrawal of consent for processing based on consent — where feasible and in a reasonable manner.

11. Deleting your account or data – how to request

11.1 You may delete your account or request deletion of data in one of the following ways:

Log in to your account and select the deletion request option;

Contact the site owner using the contact details published on the site.

11.2 Deletion will be carried out after we confirm receipt of the request and compliance with legal conditions (including data we are required to retain by law).

12. Data Protection Officer (DPO)

If we are required to appoint a Data Protection Officer under amendment 13, the Officer's details and contact information will be published on the site.

13. Minors

The Site is not intended for independent use by minors under 18. If we receive notice that a minor has provided information without parental/guardian consent, we will take steps to remove it.

14. Policy updates

We may update this policy from time to time. The current version will be published on the site and take effect as of the date of publication.
footer.termsOfServiceContent:
## Store Terms

1. You are asked to read these terms in full and carefully, as a precondition to the agreement between the parties.
2. The store is for purchasing products by users on the internet in Israel. Purchasers must be 18 or over, have an email address on the internet in Israel and an address in Israel, and hold a valid credit card in Israel.
3. A precondition for the validity of a purchase is approval by the credit card company for the transaction.
4. Browsing the store and/or purchasing the product and/or service offered for sale constitutes your agreement to accept and act in accordance with these terms. Therefore, if you do not agree to any term, you are asked not to use the store.
6. The price includes VAT unless stated otherwise.
7. There may be colour differences between the image displayed and the actual product. Such differences are due to camera type, display, screen colour settings and different screen types, etc.

## Purchasing products

The site offers a limited quantity of products at a fixed price. The sale will be conducted on the following terms:

1. The store will display a list of products including all details about the product or service offered for sale and the price as set in advance; sale is subject to stock.
2. After adding the desired products to the "shopping cart", the buyer will proceed on the "shopping cart" page to "confirm purchase" and there complete their details, after which the online purchase process is complete.

## Card verification

The business may require the customer to verify their credit card by sending a selfie of the cardholder showing ID and the credit card to the business WhatsApp number. In such a case, the name on the credit card must match the name on the ID.
If there is no match or the customer refuses to verify, the business may cancel the transaction.

## Product exchange

1. To exchange a product, send it back to the business (new and in original packaging only) within 14 days of receipt.
2. The customer will ship the product at their own expense using one of the methods listed below.
3. After the store receives the product, a replacement product of the customer's choice will be sent free of charge to a pickup point.

Products returned without original packaging, used or damaged will not be exchanged or refunded!
** Wrap the package in plastic or paper. Do not stick labels or write on the original box!

There are 2 ways to send the product and complete an exchange:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage is 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Home exchange at 49 ILS: A courier comes to your home with the replacement product to complete the exchange on the spot. 49 ILS paid in advance.

If the customer chooses to exchange for a more expensive product they will pay the difference in advance via a link sent by email or WhatsApp. If the product is cheaper, the customer will receive a refund for the difference by the same payment method.

Refund for a price difference will be made within 3 business days after the returned product reaches the warehouse and is found to be in good and unused condition!

A second exchange shipment is at the customer's expense!

## Product return and refund

To return a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.

Returns are allowed within 14 days of receipt only if the product is new, in original packaging and unused.

Return shipping is at the customer's expense.

The refund is for products only and does not include the delivery cost paid at purchase!

The refund will be made by the same payment method within 3 business days of the product reaching the store.

You may return products in one of the following ways:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Courier pickup at 39 ILS: A courier comes to your home, collects the product and returns it to us. After the product reaches us with the courier we will send you a replacement to a pickup point (not to your home): 39 ILS paid in advance.

## Order cancellation

1. In general the customer may cancel the transaction* subject to the Consumer Protection Law, 1981 (the Law: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/deal-annulment-regulations).
2. A product purchase may be cancelled before it is sent. Cancellation must be made only by notice sent via WhatsApp to 0505727854.
3. If the product has not been sent, the order will be cancelled and a refund will be made.
4. If the customer requests cancellation after the product has been sent, they must receive it and then return the product according to the "Product return and refund" procedure above. It is agreed that the customer will return the product in its packaging, unused, intact and without damage or defect of any kind. After the product reaches the store, a refund will be made for the product and will not include delivery cost.
5. The store may cancel a transaction or sale in whole or in part in the following cases:

A clerical error, whether in the product price or description.

Force majeure, act of war, hostility, terrorism, epidemic and/or anything else that prevents the proper continuation of the sale.

The product is defective.

The product is out of stock.

Suspected fraud.

6. Notice of cancellation of the sale will be given to buyers by phone and/or email to the address provided on the registration page.

*Cases in which a transaction cannot be cancelled: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/cases-for-no-annulment-rights

## Product supply

1. The store will deliver the product ordered on the site for shipment within two business days at most after approval of the transaction by the credit card company.
2. The store and/or suppliers are not responsible for delay in supplying the product in cases outside their control. Delivery delays are the responsibility of the shipping company.
3. Product and/or service supply times as indicated on the product page refer only to business days (Sun–Thu, excluding Friday, Saturday, holiday eves and holidays).

## Shipping

1. The customer will choose the type of delivery they want in the shopping cart and the delivery cost will be added to the product price.
2. Delivery will be carried out by an external shipping company "Cheetah Shipping".
3. The package will be sent within 1 business day of placing the order.
4. Delivery time is 3-5 business days from handover to the courier.
5. For "pickup point" delivery, the package will be sent to the pickup point closest to the address provided by the customer. "Cheetah" has hundreds of pickup points across the country. When the package arrives at the destination, an SMS with all details will be sent to the customer.
6. For home delivery, the package will be sent to the address provided by the customer.
7. Home delivery cost charged by the shipping company to the online store ranges from 40 ILS to 60 ILS depending on the area. The higher price is for "special areas" as defined by "Cheetah" shipping company — for the list of special areas click here.
8. Pickup point delivery cost is 20 ILS for all areas.
9. All delivery costs that the customer is asked to pay are subsidised and discounted by SHOES BOX, with the customer paying part of the delivery cost as specified in sections 8 and 9.

## Warranty

1. Warranty on products is provided by the importer or manufacturer.
2. Warranty is given for defects in the manufacturing process or materials.
3. If the product/shoe is damaged after use (e.g. broken heel or detached sole), the shoe will be repaired by the company.
4. Warranty does not apply in the following cases:

4.1 The product was used for a purpose other than its intended use (e.g. playing football in running shoes).
4.2 The product was damaged intentionally or by an external cause during use.
4.3 Scratches, scuffs, peeling or tears resulting from wear.
4.4 The shoe was cleaned by washing in water, soaking in soap, in a washing machine or by hand.
4.5 The garment was washed not according to the manufacturer's instructions (if it is a clothing product).
4.6 Wear, tear, odour and discomfort after use of the product are not considered manufacturing defects and are not covered by warranty.
4.7 Damage caused by negligent or improper use.

5. Warranty on the product is given only upon presentation of a purchase invoice and within a reasonable time.
6. Warranty on the product is given at the physical store operating the online store.
7. The store undertakes to send the product for warranty inspection to the importer or manufacturer and to have it repaired within 14 working days in case of a defect in materials or the manufacturing process, subject to reasonable use of the product.
8. After completion of the repair, the customer may choose to collect the product from the store or request delivery to them at a cost of 30 ILS to their account.

footer.returnPolicyContent:
## Product exchange

1. To exchange a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.
2. To exchange a product, send it back to the business (new and in original packaging only) within 14 days of receipt.
3. The customer will ship the product at their own expense using one of the methods listed below.
4. After the store receives the product, a replacement product of the customer's choice will be sent free of charge to a pickup point.

Products returned without original packaging, used or damaged will not be exchanged or refunded!
** Wrap the package in plastic or paper. Do not stick labels or write on the original box!

There are 2 ways to send the product and complete an exchange:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage is 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Home exchange at 49 ILS: A courier comes to your home with the replacement product to complete the exchange on the spot. 49 ILS paid in advance.

If the customer chooses to exchange for a more expensive product they will pay the difference in advance via a link sent by email or WhatsApp. If the product is cheaper, the customer will receive a refund for the difference by the same payment method.

Refund for a price difference will be made within 3 business days after the returned product reaches the warehouse and is found to be in good and unused condition!

A second exchange shipment is at the customer's expense!

## Product return and refund

To return a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.

Returns are allowed within 14 days of receipt only if the product is new, in original packaging and unused.

Return shipping is at the customer's expense.

The refund is for products only and does not include the delivery cost paid at purchase!

The refund will be made by the same payment method within 5 business days of the product reaching the store.

You may return products in one of the following ways:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp.

Courier at 40 ILS: A courier comes to your home, collects the product and returns it to us. After the product reaches us with the courier we will process your refund. You may pay the delivery cost directly to the courier or pay us online in advance by credit card via a link we send you.
footer.shippingPolicyContent:
## Shipping Policy

1. The customer will choose the type of delivery they want in the shopping cart and the delivery cost will be added to the product price.
2. Delivery will be carried out by an external shipping company "Cheetah Shipping".
3. The package will be sent within 1 business day of placing the order.
4. Delivery time is 3-5 business days from handover to the courier.
5. For "pickup point" delivery, the package will be sent to the pickup point closest to the address provided by the customer. "Cheetah" has hundreds of pickup points across the country. When the package arrives at the destination, an SMS with all details will be sent to the customer.
6. For home delivery, the package will be sent to the address provided by the customer.
7. Home delivery cost charged by the shipping company to the online store ranges from 40 ILS to 60 ILS depending on the area. The higher price is for "special areas" as defined by "Cheetah" shipping company — for the list of special areas click here.
8. Pickup point delivery cost is 20 ILS for all areas.
9. All delivery costs that the customer is asked to pay are subsidised and discounted by SHOES BOX, with the customer paying part of the delivery cost as specified in sections 8 and 9.
footer.privacyPolicyContent:
## Privacy Policy

1. Principles

This policy explains how we collect, store, use and share personal information on this website ("the Site").
"Personal information" and "processing" are as defined in the Privacy Protection Law, as amended.

2. Types of information we collect

2.1 Identifying and contact details: name, email, phone, shipping/billing address.
2.2 Order and payment details (payment details are processed by licensed payment processors; the Site does not store full card details).
2.3 Technical and usage data: IP address, device/cookie IDs, pages viewed, purchases, site activity.
2.4 Marketing preferences and correspondence.

3. How we collect information

3.1 Directly from you when you register, place an order or contact us.
3.2 Automatically via cookies and similar technologies.
3.3 From third parties: Google Analytics; we may use Facebook (Meta) and TikTok for measurement, personalisation and targeted advertising.

4. Cookies and measurement tools

4.1 The Site uses cookies and pixels of Google Analytics, and may use pixels of Facebook and TikTok for analysis, measurement, improving user experience and targeted marketing.
4.2 You can manage or delete cookies in your browser and change preferences in the site cookie manager (if available).
4.3 Third parties may set their own cookies and receive usage data (e.g. IP/advertising ID/purchase events) per their policies. We recommend reviewing those policies.
4.4 This policy distinguishes between data provided with prior knowledge and data collected via tracking, and clarifies purposes and use by third parties.

5. Purposes of processing

5.1 Account and order management; customer support.
5.2 Legal and contractual obligations (invoicing, tax).
5.3 Security, fraud prevention and risk management.
5.4 Usage analysis and site and product improvement.
5.5 Marketing and tailored offers (in line with your preferences and applicable law).

6. Sharing with third parties

6.1 Service providers acting as processors: payments, logistics/shipping, email systems, cloud and hosting infrastructure.
6.2 The store platform "istores" — information is stored and processed on the istores platform used to operate the store ("processor").
6.3 Measurement/advertising tools: Google Analytics; possibly Facebook and TikTok, as set out in section 4.
6.4 Authorities or enforcement as required by law; transfer in the context of permitted business restructuring.

7. Transfer and storage outside Israel

Some information is stored on servers of providers outside Israel. Transfers will be made in accordance with applicable legal requirements.

8. Information security

We take organisational, technical and physical measures to protect information, in accordance with the law and the Privacy Protection (Information Security) Regulations, 2017.

9. Data retention

We retain information as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, for contractual/legal obligations and to protect our rights, and thereafter delete or anonymise where possible.

10. Your rights

10.1 Right to access your personal data and receive a copy.
10.2 Right to correct or delete inaccurate or incomplete data; notice of correction/deletion will be given to those who received the information from us as required by law.
10.3 Withdrawal of consent for processing based on consent — where feasible and in a reasonable manner.

11. Deleting your account or data – how to request

11.1 You may delete your account or request deletion of data in one of the following ways:

Log in to your account and select the deletion request option;

Contact the site owner using the contact details published on the site.

11.2 Deletion will be carried out after we confirm receipt of the request and compliance with legal conditions (including data we are required to retain by law).

12. Data Protection Officer (DPO)

If we are required to appoint a Data Protection Officer under amendment 13, the Officer's details and contact information will be published on the site.

13. Minors

The Site is not intended for independent use by minors under 18. If we receive notice that a minor has provided information without parental/guardian consent, we will take steps to remove it.

14. Policy updates

We may update this policy from time to time. The current version will be published on the site and take effect as of the date of publication.
footer.termsOfServiceContent:
## Store Terms

1. You are asked to read these terms in full and carefully, as a precondition to the agreement between the parties.
2. The store is for purchasing products by users on the internet in Israel. Purchasers must be 18 or over, have an email address on the internet in Israel and an address in Israel, and hold a valid credit card in Israel.
3. A precondition for the validity of a purchase is approval by the credit card company for the transaction.
4. Browsing the store and/or purchasing the product and/or service offered for sale constitutes your agreement to accept and act in accordance with these terms. Therefore, if you do not agree to any term, you are asked not to use the store.
6. The price includes VAT unless stated otherwise.
7. There may be colour differences between the image displayed and the actual product. Such differences are due to camera type, display, screen colour settings and different screen types, etc.

## Purchasing products

The site offers a limited quantity of products at a fixed price. The sale will be conducted on the following terms:

1. The store will display a list of products including all details about the product or service offered for sale and the price as set in advance; sale is subject to stock.
2. After adding the desired products to the "shopping cart", the buyer will proceed on the "shopping cart" page to "confirm purchase" and there complete their details, after which the online purchase process is complete.

## Card verification

The business may require the customer to verify their credit card by sending a selfie of the cardholder showing ID and the credit card to the business WhatsApp number. In such a case, the name on the credit card must match the name on the ID.
If there is no match or the customer refuses to verify, the business may cancel the transaction.

## Product exchange

1. To exchange a product, send it back to the business (new and in original packaging only) within 14 days of receipt.
2. The customer will ship the product at their own expense using one of the methods listed below.
3. After the store receives the product, a replacement product of the customer's choice will be sent free of charge to a pickup point.

Products returned without original packaging, used or damaged will not be exchanged or refunded!
** Wrap the package in plastic or paper. Do not stick labels or write on the original box!

There are 2 ways to send the product and complete an exchange:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage is 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Home exchange at 49 ILS: A courier comes to your home with the replacement product to complete the exchange on the spot. 49 ILS paid in advance.

If the customer chooses to exchange for a more expensive product they will pay the difference in advance via a link sent by email or WhatsApp. If the product is cheaper, the customer will receive a refund for the difference by the same payment method.

Refund for a price difference will be made within 3 business days after the returned product reaches the warehouse and is found to be in good and unused condition!

A second exchange shipment is at the customer's expense!

## Product return and refund

To return a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.

Returns are allowed within 14 days of receipt only if the product is new, in original packaging and unused.

Return shipping is at the customer's expense.

The refund is for products only and does not include the delivery cost paid at purchase!

The refund will be made by the same payment method within 3 business days of the product reaching the store.

You may return products in one of the following ways:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Courier pickup at 39 ILS: A courier comes to your home, collects the product and returns it to us. After the product reaches us with the courier we will send you a replacement to a pickup point (not to your home): 39 ILS paid in advance.

## Order cancellation

1. In general the customer may cancel the transaction* subject to the Consumer Protection Law, 1981 (the Law: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/deal-annulment-regulations).
2. A product purchase may be cancelled before it is sent. Cancellation must be made only by notice sent via WhatsApp to 0505727854.
3. If the product has not been sent, the order will be cancelled and a refund will be made.
4. If the customer requests cancellation after the product has been sent, they must receive it and then return the product according to the "Product return and refund" procedure above. It is agreed that the customer will return the product in its packaging, unused, intact and without damage or defect of any kind. After the product reaches the store, a refund will be made for the product and will not include delivery cost.
5. The store may cancel a transaction or sale in whole or in part in the following cases:

A clerical error, whether in the product price or description.

Force majeure, act of war, hostility, terrorism, epidemic and/or anything else that prevents the proper continuation of the sale.

The product is defective.

The product is out of stock.

Suspected fraud.

6. Notice of cancellation of the sale will be given to buyers by phone and/or email to the address provided on the registration page.

*Cases in which a transaction cannot be cancelled: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/cases-for-no-annulment-rights

## Product supply

1. The store will deliver the product ordered on the site for shipment within two business days at most after approval of the transaction by the credit card company.
2. The store and/or suppliers are not responsible for delay in supplying the product in cases outside their control. Delivery delays are the responsibility of the shipping company.
3. Product and/or service supply times as indicated on the product page refer only to business days (Sun–Thu, excluding Friday, Saturday, holiday eves and holidays).

## Shipping

1. The customer will choose the type of delivery they want in the shopping cart and the delivery cost will be added to the product price.
2. Delivery will be carried out by an external shipping company "Cheetah Shipping".
3. The package will be sent within 1 business day of placing the order.
4. Delivery time is 3-5 business days from handover to the courier.
5. For "pickup point" delivery, the package will be sent to the pickup point closest to the address provided by the customer. "Cheetah" has hundreds of pickup points across the country. When the package arrives at the destination, an SMS with all details will be sent to the customer.
6. For home delivery, the package will be sent to the address provided by the customer.
7. Home delivery cost charged by the shipping company to the online store ranges from 40 ILS to 60 ILS depending on the area. The higher price is for "special areas" as defined by "Cheetah" shipping company — for the list of special areas click here.
8. Pickup point delivery cost is 20 ILS for all areas.
9. All delivery costs that the customer is asked to pay are subsidised and discounted by SHOES BOX, with the customer paying part of the delivery cost as specified in sections 8 and 9.

## Warranty

1. Warranty on products is provided by the importer or manufacturer.
2. Warranty is given for defects in the manufacturing process or materials.
3. If the product/shoe is damaged after use (e.g. broken heel or detached sole), the shoe will be repaired by the company.
4. Warranty does not apply in the following cases:

4.1 The product was used for a purpose other than its intended use (e.g. playing football in running shoes).
4.2 The product was damaged intentionally or by an external cause during use.
4.3 Scratches, scuffs, peeling or tears resulting from wear.
4.4 The shoe was cleaned by washing in water, soaking in soap, in a washing machine or by hand.
4.5 The garment was washed not according to the manufacturer's instructions (if it is a clothing product).
4.6 Wear, tear, odour and discomfort after use of the product are not considered manufacturing defects and are not covered by warranty.
4.7 Damage caused by negligent or improper use.

5. Warranty on the product is given only upon presentation of a purchase invoice and within a reasonable time.
6. Warranty on the product is given at the physical store operating the online store.
7. The store undertakes to send the product for warranty inspection to the importer or manufacturer and to have it repaired within 14 working days in case of a defect in materials or the manufacturing process, subject to reasonable use of the product.
8. After completion of the repair, the customer may choose to collect the product from the store or request delivery to them at a cost of 30 ILS to their account.

3. The store is not responsible for the assembly and/or installation of products purchased on the site, and such responsibility lies with the customer.
4. Icons (ICONS), any information and/or display on the site, including graphics, design, text, trademarks and logos including their editing and display on the site, are the exclusive property of the store.

footer.returnPolicyContent:
## Product exchange

1. To exchange a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.
2. To exchange a product, send it back to the business (new and in original packaging only) within 14 days of receipt.
3. The customer will ship the product at their own expense using one of the methods listed below.
4. After the store receives the product, a replacement product of the customer's choice will be sent free of charge to a pickup point.

Products returned without original packaging, used or damaged will not be exchanged or refunded!
** Wrap the package in plastic or paper. Do not stick labels or write on the original box!

There are 2 ways to send the product and complete an exchange:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage is 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Home exchange at 49 ILS: A courier comes to your home with the replacement product to complete the exchange on the spot. 49 ILS paid in advance.

If the customer chooses to exchange for a more expensive product they will pay the difference in advance via a link sent by email or WhatsApp. If the product is cheaper, the customer will receive a refund for the difference by the same payment method.

Refund for a price difference will be made within 3 business days after the returned product reaches the warehouse and is found to be in good and unused condition!

A second exchange shipment is at the customer's expense!

## Product return and refund

To return a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.

Returns are allowed within 14 days of receipt only if the product is new, in original packaging and unused.

Return shipping is at the customer's expense.

The refund is for products only and does not include the delivery cost paid at purchase!

The refund will be made by the same payment method within 5 business days of the product reaching the store.

You may return products in one of the following ways:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp.

Courier at 40 ILS: A courier comes to your home, collects the product and returns it to us. After the product reaches us with the courier we will process your refund. You may pay the delivery cost directly to the courier or pay us online in advance by credit card via a link we send you.
footer.shippingPolicyContent:
## Shipping Policy

1. The customer will choose the type of delivery they want in the shopping cart and the delivery cost will be added to the product price.
2. Delivery will be carried out by an external shipping company "Cheetah Shipping".
3. The package will be sent within 1 business day of placing the order.
4. Delivery time is 3-5 business days from handover to the courier.
5. For "pickup point" delivery, the package will be sent to the pickup point closest to the address provided by the customer. "Cheetah" has hundreds of pickup points across the country. When the package arrives at the destination, an SMS with all details will be sent to the customer.
6. For home delivery, the package will be sent to the address provided by the customer.
7. Home delivery cost charged by the shipping company to the online store ranges from 40 ILS to 60 ILS depending on the area. The higher price is for "special areas" as defined by "Cheetah" shipping company — for the list of special areas click here.
8. Pickup point delivery cost is 20 ILS for all areas.
9. All delivery costs that the customer is asked to pay are subsidised and discounted by SHOES BOX, with the customer paying part of the delivery cost as specified in sections 8 and 9.
footer.privacyPolicyContent:
## Privacy Policy

1. Principles

This policy explains how we collect, store, use and share personal information on this website ("the Site").
"Personal information" and "processing" are as defined in the Privacy Protection Law, as amended.

2. Types of information we collect

2.1 Identifying and contact details: name, email, phone, shipping/billing address.
2.2 Order and payment details (payment details are processed by licensed payment processors; the Site does not store full card details).
2.3 Technical and usage data: IP address, device/cookie IDs, pages viewed, purchases, site activity.
2.4 Marketing preferences and correspondence.

3. How we collect information

3.1 Directly from you when you register, place an order or contact us.
3.2 Automatically via cookies and similar technologies.
3.3 From third parties: Google Analytics; we may use Facebook (Meta) and TikTok for measurement, personalisation and targeted advertising.

4. Cookies and measurement tools

4.1 The Site uses cookies and pixels of Google Analytics, and may use pixels of Facebook and TikTok for analysis, measurement, improving user experience and targeted marketing.
4.2 You can manage or delete cookies in your browser and change preferences in the site cookie manager (if available).
4.3 Third parties may set their own cookies and receive usage data (e.g. IP/advertising ID/purchase events) per their policies. We recommend reviewing those policies.
4.4 This policy distinguishes between data provided with prior knowledge and data collected via tracking, and clarifies purposes and use by third parties.

5. Purposes of processing

5.1 Account and order management; customer support.
5.2 Legal and contractual obligations (invoicing, tax).
5.3 Security, fraud prevention and risk management.
5.4 Usage analysis and site and product improvement.
5.5 Marketing and tailored offers (in line with your preferences and applicable law).

6. Sharing with third parties

6.1 Service providers acting as processors: payments, logistics/shipping, email systems, cloud and hosting infrastructure.
6.2 The store platform "istores" — information is stored and processed on the istores platform used to operate the store ("processor").
6.3 Measurement/advertising tools: Google Analytics; possibly Facebook and TikTok, as set out in section 4.
6.4 Authorities or enforcement as required by law; transfer in the context of permitted business restructuring.

7. Transfer and storage outside Israel

Some information is stored on servers of providers outside Israel. Transfers will be made in accordance with applicable legal requirements.

8. Information security

We take organisational, technical and physical measures to protect information, in accordance with the law and the Privacy Protection (Information Security) Regulations, 2017.

9. Data retention

We retain information as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, for contractual/legal obligations and to protect our rights, and thereafter delete or anonymise where possible.

10. Your rights

10.1 Right to access your personal data and receive a copy.
10.2 Right to correct or delete inaccurate or incomplete data; notice of correction/deletion will be given to those who received the information from us as required by law.
10.3 Withdrawal of consent for processing based on consent — where feasible and in a reasonable manner.

11. Deleting your account or data – how to request

11.1 You may delete your account or request deletion of data in one of the following ways:

Log in to your account and select the deletion request option;

Contact the site owner using the contact details published on the site.

11.2 Deletion will be carried out after we confirm receipt of the request and compliance with legal conditions (including data we are required to retain by law).

12. Data Protection Officer (DPO)

If we are required to appoint a Data Protection Officer under amendment 13, the Officer's details and contact information will be published on the site.

13. Minors

The Site is not intended for independent use by minors under 18. If we receive notice that a minor has provided information without parental/guardian consent, we will take steps to remove it.

14. Policy updates

We may update this policy from time to time. The current version will be published on the site and take effect as of the date of publication.
footer.termsOfServiceContent:
## Store Terms

1. You are asked to read these terms in full and carefully, as a precondition to the agreement between the parties.
2. The store is for purchasing products by users on the internet in Israel. Purchasers must be 18 or over, have an email address on the internet in Israel and an address in Israel, and hold a valid credit card in Israel.
3. A precondition for the validity of a purchase is approval by the credit card company for the transaction.
4. Browsing the store and/or purchasing the product and/or service offered for sale constitutes your agreement to accept and act in accordance with these terms. Therefore, if you do not agree to any term, you are asked not to use the store.
6. The price includes VAT unless stated otherwise.
7. There may be colour differences between the image displayed and the actual product. Such differences are due to camera type, display, screen colour settings and different screen types, etc.

## Purchasing products

The site offers a limited quantity of products at a fixed price. The sale will be conducted on the following terms:

1. The store will display a list of products including all details about the product or service offered for sale and the price as set in advance; sale is subject to stock.
2. After adding the desired products to the "shopping cart", the buyer will proceed on the "shopping cart" page to "confirm purchase" and there complete their details, after which the online purchase process is complete.

## Card verification

The business may require the customer to verify their credit card by sending a selfie of the cardholder showing ID and the credit card to the business WhatsApp number. In such a case, the name on the credit card must match the name on the ID.
If there is no match or the customer refuses to verify, the business may cancel the transaction.

## Product exchange

1. To exchange a product, send it back to the business (new and in original packaging only) within 14 days of receipt.
2. The customer will ship the product at their own expense using one of the methods listed below.
3. After the store receives the product, a replacement product of the customer's choice will be sent free of charge to a pickup point.

Products returned without original packaging, used or damaged will not be exchanged or refunded!
** Wrap the package in plastic or paper. Do not stick labels or write on the original box!

There are 2 ways to send the product and complete an exchange:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage is 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Home exchange at 49 ILS: A courier comes to your home with the replacement product to complete the exchange on the spot. 49 ILS paid in advance.

If the customer chooses to exchange for a more expensive product they will pay the difference in advance via a link sent by email or WhatsApp. If the product is cheaper, the customer will receive a refund for the difference by the same payment method.

Refund for a price difference will be made within 3 business days after the returned product reaches the warehouse and is found to be in good and unused condition!

A second exchange shipment is at the customer's expense!

## Product return and refund

To return a product, contact customer service via WhatsApp to coordinate the return at 0505727854.

Returns are allowed within 14 days of receipt only if the product is new, in original packaging and unused.

Return shipping is at the customer's expense.

The refund is for products only and does not include the delivery cost paid at purchase!

The refund will be made by the same payment method within 3 business days of the product reaching the store.

You may return products in one of the following ways:

Registered mail to the address we provide via WhatsApp. (Postage 15–20 ILS). Once the package reaches us we will send the product you wanted to a pickup point free of charge.

Courier pickup at 39 ILS: A courier comes to your home, collects the product and returns it to us. After the product reaches us with the courier we will send you a replacement to a pickup point (not to your home): 39 ILS paid in advance.

## Order cancellation

1. In general the customer may cancel the transaction* subject to the Consumer Protection Law, 1981 (the Law: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/deal-annulment-regulations).
2. A product purchase may be cancelled before it is sent. Cancellation must be made only by notice sent via WhatsApp to 0505727854.
3. If the product has not been sent, the order will be cancelled and a refund will be made.
4. If the customer requests cancellation after the product has been sent, they must receive it and then return the product according to the "Product return and refund" procedure above. It is agreed that the customer will return the product in its packaging, unused, intact and without damage or defect of any kind. After the product reaches the store, a refund will be made for the product and will not include delivery cost.
5. The store may cancel a transaction or sale in whole or in part in the following cases:

A clerical error, whether in the product price or description.

Force majeure, act of war, hostility, terrorism, epidemic and/or anything else that prevents the proper continuation of the sale.

The product is defective.

The product is out of stock.

Suspected fraud.

6. Notice of cancellation of the sale will be given to buyers by phone and/or email to the address provided on the registration page.

*Cases in which a transaction cannot be cancelled: http://www.consumers.org.il/category/cases-for-no-annulment-rights

## Product supply

1. The store will deliver the product ordered on the site for shipment within two business days at most after approval of the transaction by the credit card company.
2. The store and/or suppliers are not responsible for delay in supplying the product in cases outside their control. Delivery delays are the responsibility of the shipping company.
3. Product and/or service supply times as indicated on the product page refer only to business days (Sun–Thu, excluding Friday, Saturday, holiday eves and holidays).

## Shipping

1. The customer will choose the type of delivery they want in the shopping cart and the delivery cost will be added to the product price.
2. Delivery will be carried out by an external shipping company "Cheetah Shipping".
3. The package will be sent within 1 business day of placing the order.
4. Delivery time is 3-5 business days from handover to the courier.
5. For "pickup point" delivery, the package will be sent to the pickup point closest to the address provided by the customer. "Cheetah" has hundreds of pickup points across the country. When the package arrives at the destination, an SMS with all details will be sent to the customer.
6. For home delivery, the package will be sent to the address provided by the customer.
7. Home delivery cost charged by the shipping company to the online store ranges from 40 ILS to 60 ILS depending on the area. The higher price is for "special areas" as defined by "Cheetah" shipping company — for the list of special areas click here.
8. Pickup point delivery cost is 20 ILS for all areas.
9. All delivery costs that the customer is asked to pay are subsidised and discounted by SHOES BOX, with the customer paying part of the delivery cost as specified in sections 8 and 9.

## Warranty

1. Warranty on products is provided by the importer or manufacturer.
2. Warranty is given for defects in the manufacturing process or materials.
3. If the product/shoe is damaged after use (e.g. broken heel or detached sole), the shoe will be repaired by the company.
4. Warranty does not apply in the following cases:

4.1 The product was used for a purpose other than its intended use (e.g. playing football in running shoes).
4.2 The product was damaged intentionally or by an external cause during use.
4.3 Scratches, scuffs, peeling or tears resulting from wear.
4.4 The shoe was cleaned by washing in water, soaking in soap, in a washing machine or by hand.
4.5 The garment was washed not according to the manufacturer's instructions (if it is a clothing product).
4.6 Wear, tear, odour and discomfort after use of the product are not considered manufacturing defects and are not covered by warranty.
4.7 Damage caused by negligent or improper use.

5. Warranty on the product is given only upon presentation of a purchase invoice and within a reasonable time.
6. Warranty on the product is given at the physical store operating the online store.
7. The store undertakes to send the product for warranty inspection to the importer or manufacturer and to have it repaired within 14 working days in case of a defect in materials or the manufacturing process, subject to reasonable use of the product.
8. After completion of the repair, the customer may choose to collect the product from the store or request delivery to them at a cost of 30 ILS to their account.

## Customer service

For any question or enquiry regarding the products displayed on the site, including information on correct use of the product and details and enquiries about the store and its operations, you may contact us:

WhatsApp: 0505727854

Email: shoesbox@outlook.co.il

## General

1. The images displayed on the site are for illustration only and do not bind the store. There may be colour differences between the image and the actual product, due to display level, screen types, etc.
2. The store and/or anyone on its behalf will not be liable for any direct, indirect, consequential or special damage caused to the user or a third party as a result of use of the site.
3. The store is not responsible for the assembly and/or installation of products purchased on the site, and such responsibility lies with the customer.
4. Icons (ICONS), any information and/or display on the site, including graphics, design, text, trademarks and logos including their editing and display on the site, are the exclusive property of the store.
5. Content on the site may not be copied, reproduced, distributed, published or used in any other way unless prior written consent has been given by the store.

contact.faqsDescription: Find quick answers to common questions.

faqs.question: What are your shipping times?
faqs.answer: Most orders ship within 24 hours. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days, and express delivery takes 1-2 business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer international shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship worldwide. International delivery typically takes 7-14 business days depending on the destination.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on all unused items in original packaging. Returns are free within the continental US.
